hero.heading: Real Work. Real Results.
hero.description: Every engagement below was a business in disorder. Here's what happened when we got involved.

projects.title: NORWAY COMMERCIAL BANK
projects.description: A major bank's data infrastructure was failing under load. We rebuilt it around a wind farm's power grid — high-availability, zero compromise, carbon-neutral.

projects.title: ARCTIC OVERHAUL
projects.description: A full data center collapse mid-pandemic, with no on-site access possible. We ran a complete remote overhaul under the 2020 isolation protocols. Everything back online in 72 hours.

projects.title: DOHA MARITIME CENTER
projects.description: Built a coastal data facility for World Cup traffic from scratch — engineered for extreme heat with seawater cooling. Delivered on schedule, under the most demanding conditions.

projects.title: TOYOTA DATA PLANT
projects.description: Toyota's assembly line was at risk every time the power systems hiccupped. We redesigned the redundancy architecture so manufacturing continuity was never in question again.
